description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages manual, build_ci_test_docker_image, build_and_test, interoperability_test, deploy_doc, and deploy_docker, using a global Maven image (maven:3.8.6-eclipse-temurin-11), caching the .m2/repository directory, and defining variables GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY, MAVEN_CLI_OPTS, and MAVEN_OPTS. In the manual stage add a start job that runs `echo "Starting to validate and verify"`, is manual, and is excluded from the master branch. In the build_ci_test_docker_image stage add a build-ci-test-docker-image job that uses docker:latest with the docker:23-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER and SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE, builds the ci_test image with `docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/sila2/sila_java/ci_test:latest -f docker/Dockerfile-ci-test .`, logs into registry.gitlab.com via `echo "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" --password-stdin registry.gitlab.com`, pushes the image, and runs only when triggered manually. In the build_and_test stage add a build_and_test job that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS install -f pom.xml` and `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS javadoc:aggregate -pl "!interoperability" -f pom.xml`, caches .m2/repository, and archives all built JAR files and the generated Javadoc site as artifacts for one week. In the interoperability_test stage add an interoperability_test job that uses the ci_test image, needs build_and_test, executes `java -jar interoperability/server/target/server-exec.jar > server.log 2>&1 & server_pid=$!`, waits, installs the Python tester, runs client and server test commands producing XML reports, captures logs, and always stores server.log, client.log, and the XML reports as artifacts. In the deploy_doc stage add a pages job that runs only on master, copies `target/site/apidocs` to a public directory, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. Finally, in the deploy_docker stage add a build-docker-image job that runs only on master, depends on build_and_test, builds multiple Docker images with `docker build -t … -f docker/Dockerfile-… .` for hello_sila_server, metadata_server, test_server_server, thermostat_server, code_generator, and broker, logs into the registry, and pushes each image.
